home.title: Nestli — Baby tracking, with AI in your corner
home.description: Feeding, sleep, growth, and photos — logged effortlessly, understood by an AI that learns your baby.
home.tagline: Feeding, sleep, growth, and photos — logged in seconds, understood by an AI that learns your baby's patterns. Ask anything; get answers grounded in your own data, not generic advice.

pricing.title: Nestli — Pricing
pricing.description: Nestli plans: Free, Premium, and Premium Family. Storage, AI, family sharing and more.
pricing.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you want a smarter AI, more storage, or to share Premium with up to 9 family members.

free.name: Free
free.summary: Core tracking for one family, with a partner to share the load.

premium.name: Premium
premium.summary: Unlimited AI, bigger storage, priority backup.

family.name: Premium Family
family.summary: Every Premium perk, shared with up to 9 family members.

pricing.note: Prices shown in AUD. Subscriptions are processed by the Google Play Store (iOS coming later) and renew monthly unless cancelled before the next billing period. Cancel any time — your plan stays active until period end. See the full Terms for fair-use and refund details.

downloads.title: Nestli — Download
downloads.description: Download Nestli for Android — English build on GitHub, Chinese build on Gitee.
downloads.sub: Direct APK for Android. Two separate builds: the English build is hosted on GitHub; the Chinese-language build is hosted on Gitee. Some features (AI, paid plans) are only available in supported regions.
downloads.note: Installing an APK requires allowing "Install unknown apps" for your browser in Android Settings → Apps → Special app access. The APK is signed with the same upload key used on Google Play.

security.title: Nestli — Security & Trust
security.description: How Nestli keeps your baby's data safe: encrypted on-device cache, family-isolated storage, automatic photo moderation, real account deletion, and no third-party tracking.
security.sub: Nestli is a baby tracker, not an ad network. Here's exactly what we do — and don't do — with the information you trust us with.

encryptedDevice.title: Encrypted on your device
encryptedDevice.body: The cache that powers fast cold-launches — feeds, sleeps, growth, photo captions — is encrypted with a per-install key stored in the device's secure enclave (Keychain on iOS, EncryptedSharedPreferences on Android). A lost or wiped phone can't have your baby's records read off it.

familyIsolated.title: Family-isolated by default
familyIsolated.body: Every read and write goes through a per-baby membership check. Another family cannot see your records, even if our systems were misconfigured — the database itself enforces the boundary, not just the app.

photoCheck.title: Photos checked before they're saved
photoCheck.body: Every photo runs through automatic content review the moment it's uploaded. Anything that doesn't meet our family-friendly guidelines is rejected and removed before it's stored — keeping your timeline appropriate even when extended family is invited.

realDelete.title: Real account deletion
realDelete.body: Deleting a baby is a verified, three-step action: warning, type the baby's name, then enter a 6-digit code we email to you. A wrong tap can't wipe a year of memories. Account deletion removes your profile and uploaded photos from live systems.

noAds.title: No ads. No resale. No tracking SDKs.
noAds.body: There are no advertising networks, no analytics SDKs that profile users, and no data brokers in the picture. We don't sell your information; we don't trade it. Nestli is funded by the people who pay for it — full stop.

aiLane.title: AI+ stays inside the lane
aiLane.body: The AI assistant only answers baby-care questions. Off-topic and jailbreak attempts — including text hidden inside uploaded photos — are refused. Your AI conversations are never used to train models; the providers we use forbid that on their API.

storedAU.title: Stored in Australia
storedAU.body: Your records and photos live in the Asia Pacific (Sydney) region. Photos are served through a global delivery network so a relative in another country sees your baby's first steps quickly — without making the underlying storage public.

encryptedTransit.title: Encrypted in transit
encryptedTransit.body: Every connection between the app, our servers, and our subprocessors uses HTTPS. Photo URLs are short-lived and signed — even if one is intercepted, it expires in hours and only points to your own private bucket path.

security.dontClaimBody:
Marketing pages love to overstate what's possible. We'd rather be plain:

  • We're not end-to-end encrypted. The AI feature needs to read your context to answer questions, and your partner's device needs to read your records to show them — that means our servers see the data while it's in use.
  • We're not "unhackable." Nothing on the internet is. We minimise what we collect, isolate it per family, and watch for problems — but absolute claims are red flags wherever you read them.
  • We don't currently hold formal certifications like SOC 2 or HIPAA. We follow the principles those frameworks teach (least-privilege access, encrypted storage, audit logging) without paying for the badge.
  • We're a small team. If a serious vulnerability is reported to us, we'll fix it and tell affected users — but we don't pretend to have a 24/7 security operations centre.
security.subprocessorsLead: The full list of subprocessors and what they do — same list as our Privacy Policy, restated plainly:
security.subprocessorsTable:
Supabase
Database, authentication, and serverless functions. Holds your records.
Amazon Web Services
Photo storage in Sydney, plus the image-moderation service that powers automatic content review.
Amazon CloudFront
Global delivery network that serves your photos quickly to invited family in other countries.
OpenAI
Powers AI+ chat answers and voice-log transcription. API data is not used to train models.
Moonshot (Kimi)
Alternative AI provider for routine Chinese-language questions; same no-training contract.
Resend
Sends transactional emails: verification codes, password resets, family invites, baby-delete confirmations.
security.youCanDoBody:
• Use a device passcode or biometric. The on-device encryption above relies on your device being locked when you're not using it.
  • Sign out on shared devices. Signing out wipes the cached data so the next person doesn't see your baby's records.
  • Review who's invited. Open Family Settings to see exactly who has access to each baby. Revoke any member at any time.
  • Reach out. If something looks off — a member you didn't invite, a record you didn't make — email support@nestliapp.com and we'll investigate the same day.
security.footerNote: Security is a moving target. This page reflects how Nestli works as of the current release; we update it as we change. For the legal version of how data is handled, see the Privacy Policy. Questions or responsible-disclosure reports: privacy@nestliapp.com.

privacy.title: Nestli — Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Nestli privacy policy: what we collect, where it lives, who we share with, and your rights.
privacy.body:
This Privacy Policy describes how Nestli ("we", "our", or "the app"), a mobile application for tracking baby care activities, collects, uses, stores, and shares information about you when you use the app. It should be read alongside our Terms & Conditions.

1. Information We Collect

We collect the following categories of information:

  • Account information — email address, username, and password (stored in hashed form) provided during sign-up. A user identifier (UUID) is generated server-side to identify your account.
  • Baby profile data — baby name, date of birth, sex, birth measurements, and cover photo that you voluntarily enter.
  • Care logs — feeding, diaper, sleep, growth, health, and milestone records that you create in the app.
  • Photos — images you choose to upload from your device camera or photo library. Three sizes (original, preview, thumbnail) are generated on-device and stored in our private photo bucket. By uploading any photo to Nestli, you confirm that you own or have the necessary rights to that image, and — where the image depicts a child — that you are the parent or legal guardian of the child or have authority from them. See section 5 of the Terms & Conditions for the full responsibilities and warranties that apply to content you upload.
  • Voice recordings (optional) — when you use the voice-log feature, audio is sent to our server for transcription into a care log. Audio is processed in memory only and is not persisted by Nestli. See section 5 for the third-party transcription provider.
  • Usage data — basic, non-identifying information about how the app is used (e.g. feature interactions) for reliability and improvement. We do not use analytics SDKs that profile users.

2. Camera, Photo Library, and Microphone Access

Nestli requests access to your device camera and photo library so that you can capture or select photos of your baby to attach to your records. Microphone access is requested only when you use the voice-log feature. These permissions are used only when you explicitly invoke the corresponding feature inside the app.

You can deny or revoke any of these permissions at any time via your device settings. Denying them will disable the relevant features but will not affect other parts of the app.

3. How We Use Information

  • To provide the core features of the app — storing and displaying your baby care records.
  • To authenticate you and keep your account secure.
  • To send transactional emails such as email verification, password reset, email change notifications, and family invites.
  • To provide the optional AI+ assistant feature, which sends a summary of recent log activity (not raw data, not photos) to a third-party AI provider to generate responses to your questions. You can attach a photo to an AI question if you choose to; that photo is sent for that single request.
  • To transcribe voice-log recordings into care logs via a third-party transcription provider.
  • To diagnose problems and improve reliability.

We do not sell your personal information. We do not use your data for advertising.

4. Data Storage and Security

Text records (feeding, diaper, sleep, growth, etc.), account data, and authentication are stored on Supabase, a managed backend provider, using encrypted connections and row-level security so that only you and the family members you explicitly invite can access your baby records.

Photos are stored on Amazon Web Services (AWS S3) in the Asia Pacific (Sydney) region, in a private bucket that is not publicly readable. They are served to your device through Amazon CloudFront, a global content delivery network, using short-lived signed URLs — this lets users in different regions (including mainland China, via CloudFront edge locations in Hong Kong, Tokyo, or Singapore) load photos quickly without making the bucket public.

Photos uploaded to Nestli pass through an automated image-moderation step that screens for content that breaches our policies or applicable law. This screening is automated and best-effort: we do not warrant that it will catch every prohibited image, and we may remove a photo we subsequently determine to be in breach. Concerns about a specific photo can be reported to the contact address in section 11.

All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS). Supabase and AWS S3 encrypt data at rest using their standard provider-managed keys.

5. Third-Party Service Providers

Nestli uses the following service providers to operate the app. Limited user data is shared with each only as required for the listed purpose, and none of them sell your data.

  • Supabase — application database, authentication, and serverless functions.
  • Amazon Web Services (AWS) — Amazon S3 photo storage, Asia Pacific (Sydney) region.
  • Amazon CloudFront — global content delivery network that serves photos from edge locations closer to your device.
  • OpenAI — processes AI+ chat requests and voice-log transcriptions. Baby context data is sent per your questions; voice audio is sent per your recordings. OpenAI states that data submitted via its API is not used to train models.
  • Resend — sends transactional emails such as verification codes, password resets, email-change notifications, and family invites.

By using the Service you agree to these sub-processors being used. The list may be updated as our infrastructure evolves; material additions will be communicated in-app.

6. Family Sharing

You may invite other users (for example, a partner or caregiver) to view or edit records for a specific baby. Invited members only gain access after accepting an invite code or email invitation. You can revoke their access at any time from the app. Revoking access removes a member's ability to view future data but does not erase entries they previously created.

7. Children's Privacy

Nestli is designed for use by adult caregivers to record information about their own children. The app is not directed at children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information directly from children. The data stored about an infant or child within Nestli is provided by the parent or legal guardian on behalf of that child.

8. Your Rights

You can:

  • Access, update, or delete your records from within the app.
  • Delete your account, which will remove your profile and associated records from our systems.
  • Contact us to request a copy or deletion of your data.

9. Data Retention

We retain your data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, your personal information and uploaded photos are removed from live systems within a reasonable period. Routine backups may retain data for up to 30 days before being purged. Voice-log audio is not retained at all by Nestli — it is passed through to the transcription provider in memory and discarded.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated through the app or by email. Continued use of Nestli after a change constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

11. Contact

Questions about this policy or your data can be sent to:
privacy@nestliapp.com

terms.title: Nestli — Terms & Conditions
terms.description: Terms and conditions governing the use of Nestli.
terms.intro: Welcome to Nestli. These Terms & Conditions (the "Terms") govern your use of the Nestli mobile application and related services (the "Service"). By creating an account you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
terms.body:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By creating an account, signing in, or using any feature of the Service, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you are using the Service on behalf of a minor (such as your own child), you confirm that you are the parent or legal guardian and have authority to provide the information you share.

2. Your Account

You are responsible for keeping your username, email, and password confidential. You agree to provide accurate information during sign-up and to keep that information up to date. You must not share your account with others or allow anyone else to access it. You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.

3. Your Data and Privacy

Nestli stores the baby care data you log (feedings, diapers, sleep, growth, photos, etc.) so you can access it across your devices and share it with family members you invite. Data is stored on managed cloud infrastructure — text logs and account data on Supabase; photo files on Amazon Web Services (AWS S3, region: Sydney, Australia) and delivered to your device via Amazon CloudFront's global edge network. See "Third-Party Service Providers" below for the full list. Your data is not sold to third parties. You can delete your babies, logs, and account at any time, which will remove the associated data from our active systems within a reasonable period.

4. Family Sharing and Invites

When you invite another user to a baby profile, that user will be able to view and, depending on the role you assign, add or edit records for that baby. You are responsible for choosing whom you invite and for the role you grant. Revoking a member's access removes their ability to view future data but does not erase entries they previously created.

5. Your Content and Photos

You retain ownership of the photos, captions, notes, and other content you upload to Nestli ("Your Content"). By uploading Your Content, you make the following representations and grant the following limited licence:

  • Rights and ownership. You represent that you own Your Content or have all necessary rights, licences, and permissions to upload it and to allow it to be processed and shared as described in these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
  • Images of children. Where Your Content depicts a child, you represent that you are the parent or legal guardian of the child, or otherwise have the authority of the parent or legal guardian, to upload, store, and share the image inside Nestli.
  • Images of other people. Where Your Content depicts any identifiable person other than the child whose profile the content belongs to, you represent that you have that person's permission (or the permission of their guardian) to upload the image to Nestli and to share it with the family members you invite.
  • Family sharing authority. When you invite a family member to a baby profile, you represent that you have authority to share Your Content with that person.
  • Limited operating licence. You grant Nestli a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free licence to host, store, transmit, resize, generate thumbnails of, run automated content-moderation against, and make Your Content available to the family members you invite, solely as needed to operate the Service. We do not use Your Content for advertising, training third-party AI models, or any purpose outside operating the Service.
  • Indemnity. You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Nestli and its contributors against any claim, demand, or liability (including reasonable legal costs) arising out of Your Content, your representations above, or your sharing of Your Content with others, except to the extent the claim arises from Nestli's own breach of these Terms or applicable law.
  • Removal. Nestli may automatically screen, refuse, restrict, or remove content that we reasonably believe breaches these Terms, our policies, or applicable law, including in response to a credible rights complaint. We will use reasonable efforts to notify you when content you uploaded is removed, except where notification is impractical or legally restricted.

Image moderation is automated and best-effort; we do not warrant that every prohibited image will be detected or that every detection is correct. If you believe content has been wrongly removed, or you wish to report content that should be removed, contact us at privacy@nestliapp.com.

6. AI+ and Informational Content

Nestli may offer AI-generated suggestions, summaries, or answers based on the data you log. This content is provided for informational and educational purposes only and is NOT medical advice. Always consult a qualified pediatrician or healthcare professional for medical questions, diagnoses, or treatment decisions. Nestli and its providers are not liable for decisions made based on AI-generated content.

7. Acceptable Use

You agree not to misuse the Service. You will not attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' accounts or data, upload content that is illegal or infringes anyone's rights, reverse-engineer or disrupt the Service, or use the Service to harass or harm others. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules.

8. Changes and Termination

We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated through the app. Continued use of the Service after an update constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. You may stop using the Service and delete your account at any time. We may also suspend or terminate the Service or any account where required by law or in case of a serious policy violation.

9. Disclaimer and Limitation of Liability

The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. While we work to keep your data safe and the Service running, we cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability or that stored data will never be lost. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Nestli and its contributors are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.

10. AI and Fair Use

AI features are limited to topics related to mother & baby care, parenting, growth tracking, and family life. Nestli may limit AI usage that is unusual, bulk, or outside intended use. If a user repeatedly asks questions unrelated to the Service's purpose, we may suspend AI features for that account. "Unlimited" means unlimited within normal household use — it does not cover commercial use, bulk queries, or automated access.

11. Photos and Storage

Photo storage is a single family-shared capacity used by all members of a baby profile. Daily upload limits follow the rules currently in effect, which Nestli may adjust based on service conditions. Storage is intended for baby photos, growth records, and family-related content; it is not a long-term file backup service, and it is not for content unrelated to the Service. We may restrict uploads in cases of abnormal upload activity, bulk videos, non-family content, or other storage abuse. Specific responsibilities and warranties for the photos themselves are set out in section 5.

12. Family Members and Permissions

Free accounts support an Owner plus 1 Partner. Premium and Premium Family plans can invite up to 9 additional family members. Permissions may vary by role — for example, Owner, Partner, or Grandparent. Premium benefits within a Family plan apply only to the baby profiles owned by the paying Owner; invited members' own baby profiles remain on the Free tier.

13. Data and History

Baby profiles and growth history are retained indefinitely by default. AI historical analysis may read a different span of logs depending on your plan (e.g. Free accounts are limited to the last 30 days). We back up data regularly, but you should still keep your own copies of anything important.

14. Plans and Pricing

Plan pricing may differ by region, tax, exchange rate, or app-store policy. Subscriptions renew automatically unless cancelled before the next billing period. Partial refunds for consumed periods are generally not available. Nestli may adjust plan inclusions, pricing, upload limits, or AI quotas, with notice before a material change takes effect.

15. Third-Party Service Providers

Nestli uses the following service providers to operate the app. Limited user data is shared with each only as required for the listed purpose, and none of them sell your data.

Supabase — application database, authentication, and serverless functions.
Amazon Web Services (AWS) — photo storage on Amazon S3 in the Asia Pacific (Sydney) region.
Amazon CloudFront — global content delivery network used to serve photos from edge locations closer to your device (for example, users in mainland China are served from Hong Kong / Tokyo / Singapore POPs rather than Sydney).
OpenAI — processes AI+ chat requests; baby context data is sent per your questions and is not used to train models.
Resend — sends transactional emails such as verification codes, password resets, and invites.

By using the Service you agree to these sub-processors being used. The list may be updated as our infrastructure evolves; material additions will be communicated in-app.

If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at privacy@nestliapp.com.

deleteAccount.title: Nestli — Delete My Account
deleteAccount.description: How to permanently delete your Nestli account and associated data.
deleteAccount.intro: This page explains how to request deletion of your Nestli account and all associated personal data. Nestli is a mobile application for tracking baby care activities, developed by the Nestli team.
deleteAccount.stepsBody:
Send an email to support@nestliapp.com from the email address associated with your Nestli account, with the subject line:

Delete my Nestli account

Please include in the body of the email:

  • Your Nestli username (if you remember it), or
  • The email address you used to sign up

We will process your request within 7 business days and send a confirmation email once your account and associated data have been deleted.
deleteAccount.whatBody:
When you request account deletion, the following data is permanently removed from our active systems:

  • Your account profile (username, email, password hash)
  • Baby profiles you created and own
  • All care logs (feeding, diaper, sleep, growth, health records)
  • Photos you uploaded to Nestli
  • Invite codes you generated
  • AI assistant usage history tied to your account
deleteAccount.retainedBody:
Some information may be kept for a limited period for legal, security, or operational reasons:

  • Backups — routine encrypted database backups may retain your data for up to 30 days after deletion, after which they are overwritten.
  • Transactional logs — server access logs and email delivery logs may be retained for up to 90 days for security and abuse-prevention purposes. These logs do not contain your baby care records.
  • Shared baby data — if another family member was also a member of a baby profile you shared, that family member remains the owner of their own copy of the records they created. Your membership is removed, but records they added are not deleted.
deleteAccount.h2Specific: Alternative: Request Deletion of Specific Data Only
deleteAccount.specificBody:
If you do not want to delete your entire account but want specific data removed (for example, a particular baby profile or photo), you can either:

  • Delete it directly inside the Nestli app, or
  • Email support@nestliapp.com with the subject Delete my data and a description of what you would like removed.
deleteAccount.questionsBody: For any questions about account or data deletion, contact support@nestliapp.com.

crossBorder.title: Nestli — Cross-Border Data Transfer
crossBorder.description: How Nestli handles cross-border data transfer for global users, including specific notice for users in mainland China.
crossBorder.notice: This notice applies to all users globally, with specific guidance for users in mainland China who must understand cross-border data handling before registering, signing in, uploading data, or continuing to use Nestli.
crossBorder.body:
Nestli is operated by an Australian entity. To provide account login, data sync, photo storage, family sharing, app security, error diagnostics, customer support, transactional emails, voice transcription, and AI-assisted features (where available), your personal information may be transferred to, stored in, accessed from, and processed in regions outside mainland China.

1. Overseas recipients

Overseas recipients that may receive or process your personal information include:

  • Nestli's Australian operating entity — operates the app, provides user support, handles data deletion and security requests.
  • Supabase — application database, authentication, and serverless functions.
  • Amazon Web Services (AWS) — photo and file storage in the Asia Pacific (Sydney) region.
  • Amazon CloudFront — global content delivery network used to deliver photos and files to your device.
  • OpenAI — processes AI+ chat requests and voice transcriptions in supported regions.
  • Resend — sends transactional emails such as verification codes, password resets, email-change notifications, and family invites.

2. Purposes of processing

Cross-border processing serves the following purposes:

  • Creating, signing in, verifying, and securing user accounts.
  • Syncing and displaying baby profiles, care logs, photos, and family-shared data.
  • Providing family invitations, role management, and account deletion.
  • Sending verification codes, password resets, email-change notifications, family invites, and security alerts.
  • Diagnosing errors, maintaining application security, processing user requests, and improving service stability.
  • Providing voice transcription and AI-assisted features in supported regions.
  • Enforcing necessary regional identification and feature limitations.

3. Categories of personal information

Information that may be transferred and processed cross-border includes:

  • Account data: email, username, account identifier, login and verification info.
  • Device and usage data: device type, OS version, app version, basic regional signals, error logs, and feature usage.
  • Child-related information: nickname, date of birth, sex, growth, feeding, sleep, diaper, health, and milestone records.
  • Photos and user content: photos, captions, notes, and other content you actively upload.
  • Family sharing data: family relationships, invite records, member roles and permissions.
  • Voice data: audio submitted when using the voice-log feature; the audio is used only for transcription and is not persisted by Nestli.
  • AI request data: questions, necessary context, and any photos you choose to attach when using AI features in supported regions.

4. Storage locations

Text records, account data, and authentication services may be processed by Supabase in its regions. Photos are primarily stored in Amazon Web Services (AWS S3) Asia Pacific (Sydney) region and may be delivered through Amazon CloudFront's global edge network. Email, AI, transcription, backups, error diagnostics, and other technical services may take place in Australia, the United States, Singapore, or other regions outside mainland China.

5. Specific notice for users in mainland China

If you are located in mainland China, before registering, signing in, uploading data, or continuing to use the app you should separately confirm and consent that your account information, device information, usage records, family data, child-related information, photos, log records, and content you actively submit may be transferred to, stored in, accessed from, and processed in regions outside mainland China.

If you do not consent to the cross-border transfer and processing described above, please do not register, sign in, upload data, or continue to use this app.

6. Feature availability in mainland China

The mainland China distribution of Nestli (the APK released through Gitee for users located in mainland China) disables the following features at runtime, regardless of account tier:

  • AI+ assistant — chat answers, photo questions, and any other AI-generated content.
  • Voice-to-log recording — the microphone affordance on the floating action button is removed entirely.
  • Paid subscriptions and in-app purchases — the subscription page is not reachable from the mainland China distribution.

Your account, baby profiles, care logs, and photos are shared between the global build and the mainland China distribution. The only difference is which features the app exposes at runtime; switching between distributions does not migrate or duplicate your data.

7. User rights

You may exercise the following rights through in-app features or by contacting us:

  • Access, correct, or delete your personal information.
  • Delete baby profiles, care logs, photos, or your account.
  • Withdraw consent or request account deactivation.
  • Request explanation of personal information processing rules and cross-border transfer arrangements.
  • Consult, complain, or request our assistance with data export and deletion.

8. Contact

Questions about this notice or cross-border data handling can be sent to:
privacy@nestliapp.com

This notice should be read together with the Privacy Policy and the Terms & Conditions.
